Notice Of Hearing And Joint Motion To Amend Minors Compromise Order Nunc Pro Tunc To Reflect Correction To Paragraph 7b, To Wit, That The Funding Of The Structured Settlement Was Split Between Prudential Assigned Settlement Services Corporation And John Hancock Assignment Company
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Amend Minors Compromise Order Nunc Pro Tunc hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
CHristopher Keane, Esq. appeared for Petitioner Jessica Jiunti as guardian ad litem for Mariana Ruiz, a Minor.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the moving papers filed with the court, and good cause appearing, the Court granted the motion amending an order for minors compromise Nunc Pro Tunc, see scanned doc. for details of the order.
Order was submitted and signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
